/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wall -flto -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libbrotli.so -o libbrotli.so CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/common/constants.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/common/context.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/common/dictionary.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/common/platform.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/common/shared_dictionary.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/common/transform.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/dec/bit_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/dec/decode.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/dec/huffman.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/dec/state.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/backward_references.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/backward_references_hq.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/bit_cost.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/block_splitter.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/brotli_bit_stream.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/cluster.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/command.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/compound_dictionary.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/compress_fragment.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/compress_fragment_two_pass.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/dictionary_hash.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/encode.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/encoder_dict.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/entropy_encode.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/fast_log.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/histogram.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/literal_cost.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/metablock.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/static_dict.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/enc/utf8_util.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/brotli/tools/brotli.c.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/natives/src/main/cpp/common_jni.cc.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/natives/src/main/cpp/decoder_jni.cc.o CMakeFiles/brotli.dir/natives/src/main/cpp/encoder_jni.cc.o
